title: Axo_MOF
author: Young-Jae Ryu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the software, analysis workflows, and supporting assets for  Axo , a modular autonomous platform for solution-phase batch synthesis. The platform integrates robotic reagent delivery, programmable tool changing, cyclic in situ UV–Vis measurements, kinetic model fitting, and reaction-aware Bayesian optimization to co-optimize  what formulation to test  and  how the experiment should be executed .
steps_raw: This repository contains the software, analysis workflows, and supporting assets for  Axo , a modular autonomous platform for solution-phase batch synthesis. The platform integrates robotic reagent delivery, programmable tool changing, cyclic in situ UV–Vis measurements, kinetic model fitting, and reaction-aware Bayesian optimization to co-optimize  what formulation to test  and  how the experiment should be executed .
